releaseNotesMarkdown:
Comparing against published beta build beta-2026.0428.0646
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Patrol(ironvow): added Sentinel.ConstantTimeEquals and ClearBytes to RTMTools.Core.Security
- Peer(hearthstone): migrate HMAC comparison to Sentinel.ConstantTimeEquals in LicenseManager.cs
- Patrol(forgewyrm-creator): reset achievement IsNew flag after toast dismiss
- Patrol(steelward): Created ErrorBuilder and CommandError — standardized TaskDialog error builder for RTMTools commands
- Peer(vigilant): Migrate SortForgeCommand catch block to ErrorBuilder pattern
- Patrol(plumbersmith-creator): fix sender in OnStreakBroken event invocation
- Forgemaster: align OnMilestoneReached sender with OnStreakBroken pattern
- Patrol(aegis): fix DownButton off-by-one in SheetIndexSorterWindow
- Patrol(sumsmith-creator): add magnitude bonus to Resonance system — big Tier 1→3 jumps get head start
- Patrol(glimmerscale-creator): Added FlowField physics framework and GlimmerField interactive playground with G-L-I-M-M-E-R key trigger
- Patrol(swiftblade): CadForgeCommand single-pass sheet sort (OrderBy+ThenBy → Comparer)
- Forge(arcadesmith-creator): bridge LogicSweeperGame to ArcadeGameBase
- Patrol(cinderbloom): unsubscribe timer Tick handlers in RegionForgeWindow.OnClosed
- Patrol(embersong): add WhereElementIsNotElementType quick filter to 5 collectors in KeyForgeViewModel
- Patrol(emberveil): weave ForgeTooltip* DynamicResource bindings into KeyForge welcome ToolTip
- Peer(pathfinder): fix HealthCheckWindow Circuit Breaker overlay hardcoded colors
- Patrol(flameveil): add ReduceMotion guard to PinButton and UnpinButton in PinForgeWindow — eliminates RepeatBehavior=Forever + DropShadowEffect anti-pattern (WCAG 2.1 AA / xaml-safety rule)
- Forge(sparkweave-creator): added ForgeAttention — beckon/spotlight animation system in RTMTools.UI
- Peer(stormwing): fix Beckon ReduceMotion — remove stray Opacity=1 that bypassed the guard
- Forgemaster: fix FlashSpotlightInstant — restore original border after flash so ReduceMotion path never leaks state
- Patrol(sparkweave): added EmberlightReadyGlowButtonStyle to UseButton and BatchButton in ViewportPositionQuickSelectWindow; null Effect on both buttons in OnClosing for render-thread cleanup
- Forge(compassforge-creator): create PredictiveDefaults — workflow intelligence engine for form field pre-fill
- Peer(prismsight): fix ThemeProperties.ReduceMotion null-guard and add AutomationProperties on action buttons
- Patrol(shadowforge): fix KeyForgeWindow busy overlay for dark mode

_(+ 17 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
